prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Waking up is an essential but rather unremarkable daily routine. I found the experience to be overly repetitive—there's not much variety, and you're forced to do it every day without much choice. The "auto-sleep" feature could use some improvement as it often starts too early or ends abruptly. Despite the claims, I did not feel fully refreshed after the latest update, which promised more energizing "morning modes." The process of waking can be a struggle and is especially challenging if you hit the snooze function. Overall, a 3-star experience; it gets the job done, but don't expect any life-changing features.
